summary: Capture the frozen Aurora preset frame for visual scoring at the deterministic default route.

content.objective: Verify that the frozen Aurora scene renders a settled iridescent shader frame with its control panel, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Wait for the scene to finish rendering the first frame
validations: A glowing, noise-displaced 3D shape is rendered in the center of the scene
The control panel shows the active preset as Aurora

summary: Capture the frozen Ember preset frame for visual scoring.

content.objective: Verify that the frozen Ember scene renders a settled warm-toned shader frame with its control panel, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Wait for the scene to finish rendering the first frame
validations: A glowing, noise-displaced 3D shape is rendered in warm red and gold tones
The control panel shows the active preset as Ember

summary: Toggle the Wireframe control on the live scene and confirm the mesh renders as wireframe.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Wireframe toggle switches the central mesh to a wireframe rendering, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Wireframe toggle button in the control panel
validations: The central 3D shape now renders as a wireframe mesh of edges rather than a solid surface
The Wireframe toggle shows the On state

summary: Functional check: clicking the Ember preset button on the live scene restyles it to warm tones and marks Ember active.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Ember preset button restyles the scene to warm tones and marks Ember as active, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Ember preset button in the control panel
validations: The control panel shows the active preset as Ember
The scene colors change to warm red and gold tones

summary: Functional check: clicking the Aurora preset button returns the scene to the cool Aurora state.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Aurora preset button returns the scene to cool teal and violet tones and marks Aurora as active, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Aurora preset button in the control panel
validations: The control panel shows the active preset as Aurora
The scene colors return to cool teal and violet tones
